prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A house shown in isometric cross-section view, revealing three distinct architectural layers representing the Home Brain 3-Layer Architecture. FOUNDATION LAYER (Blue #6C82FE dominant): The house's foundation and basement level, representing 'Family Identity' — the unchanging core. Contains recognizable icons: an allergy warning triangle, a budget/wallet icon, a safety shield, and a heart for family values. Solid, stable, heavy visual weight. Specific faces left Pure White #FFFFFF to create luminosity. Clean matte black #111111 outlines on all shapes. FIRST FLOOR (Orange #F59400 dominant): Representing 'Accumulated Learning' — what the system has learned over time. Contains icons: a cooking pot with steam (recipe history), a small bar chart (patterns), a calendar with seasonal markers, four small cards representing Substitution Modes (lock, arrows, magnifying glass, dice), and a checklist with checkmarks. This layer shows growth and accumulation. White faces interspersed for airiness. SECOND FLOOR (Pink #FC6978 dominant): Representing 'Right Now' — real-time context. Contains icons: a small refrigerator, a weather cloud with sun, a clock, a GPS pin, and a battery/energy meter. Dynamic, current, ephemeral data. A large matte black silhouette hand reaches from the right side, touching the second floor. Thin precise flowing arcs of light (not chains or coins) show data flowing downward from Layer 3 through Layer 2 to Layer 1 — representing how real-time data informs accumulated learning and identity. The entire composition sits on an expansive Light Gray #EEEEEE background with generous negative space on all sides for maximum airiness. All forms defined with clean, uniform-weight matte black #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading only — no realistic gradients. Element White #FFFFFF used strategically on specific faces to create internal cleanliness and light within the structure.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, soft edges, textured outlines, decorative objects, chess pieces, dice, coins, cryptocurrency, dark background, cluttered composition, shadows on background, 3D rendering engine look, Blender, C4D photorealism
